tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, I'm a turner[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I turn pages all the time[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't like where I'm at[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
34 was bad[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
So I just turn to 35[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, I'm a keeper[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
I keep digging down for the deep[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Like the records I'm playing[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
They might keep you waiting[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
But you know I'm gonna play 'em for keeps[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
And if the house just keeps on winning[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
I got a wildcard up on my sleeve[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
And if love keeps giving me lemons[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I'll just mix 'em in my drink[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
And if the whole wide world stops singing[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
And all the stars go dark[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
I'll keep a light on in my soul[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Keep bluebird in my heart[/tab]

[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 3]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Well, I'm a giver[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah and I'm still giving 'em hell[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
Forgiving's pretty hard[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
So I made an art[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Out of forgettin' 'em well[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, I'm a rhymer[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I can turn twenty cents into a Ten[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
And if I get confused[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
And I start to lose[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I rhyme a dime 'til it all makes sense[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
And if the house just keeps on winning[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I got a wildcard up on my sleeve[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
And if love keeps giving me lemons[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I'll just mix 'em in my drink[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
And if the whole wide world stops singing[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
And all the stars go dark[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
I'll keep a light on in my soul[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Keep bluebird in my heart[/tab]
